prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild, Celestia Vale in a modest travel dress and Ren Starling in cream and mint healer robes sitting at a wooden tavern table; Celestia carefully opens an ancient, glowing codex and slides it across the table toward Ren, pointing at a pulsating magical seal on the parchment with an inquisitive expression, warm tavern lighting, anime style, high-quality character detail, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild shot; Ren Starling leans in, his face illuminated by the soft glow of the codex, he carefully hovers his hand near the magical seal to analyze the residual energy, then looks up at Celestia and nods in understanding, consistent character designs and tavern background, fluid motion, no text, no watermark.
